allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/products.json'\)\); print\(f'Total productos: {len\(d\)}'\); p=d[0]; print\('Primer producto keys:', list\(p.keys\(\)\)\); print\('img:', p.get\('img','NO IMG'\)[:80]\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf-8'\);const s=h.match\(/<script[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/g\)||[];let src=s.map\(b=>b.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g,''\)\).join\('\\n'\);require\('vm'\).createContext\({}\);try{new Function\(src\);console.log\('OK - sin errores de sintaxis'\)}catch\(e\){console.error\('ERROR:',e.message\)}")
